name: Erl

aliases.name: Url
aliases.comment: Url record that holds url attributes
aliases.type: { host : Host, fragment : List String, password : String, path : List String, port_ : Int, protocol : String, query : Dict String String, username : String }

values.name: extractFragment
values.comment: Extract the fragment (hash) from the url

values.name: extractHost
values.comment: Extract the host from the url

values.name: extractPath
values.comment: Extract the path from the url

values.name: extractPort
values.comment: Extract the port from the url

values.name: extractProtocol
values.comment: Extract the protocol from the url

values.name: extractQuery
values.comment: Extract the query string from the url

values.name: parse
values.comment:
Parse a Url an return a Erl.Url record

    parse "http://api.example.com/users/1#x/1?a=1" == Erl.Url{...}
